action_set_definitions.name: get_mission_manifest
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves general mission parameters including current weather, hazard zones, and elapsed time. Essential for initial orientation.

action_set_definitions.name: get_unit_diagnostics
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a detailed list of all active rescue units, their current coordinates, battery/fuel levels, and specifically the thermal states for K9 assets.

action_set_definitions.name: scan_resource_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Checks availability and locations of critical supplies such as medical kits, sterile containers, and hydration.

action_set_definitions.name: acquire_sterile_plsa
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the retrieval of a Pure Last Seen Article (PLSA) from a specified location using a sterile collection method to avoid contamination.

unit_id.description: The ID of the unit performing the collection.

location_id.description: The identifier for the campsite or specific coordinate.

action_set_definitions.name: dispatch_unit
action_set_definitions.description: Moves a rescue unit to a specific destination coordinate or named landmark.

unit_id.description: ID of the unit to move.

action_set_definitions.name: conduct_scent_search
action_set_definitions.description: Commands a K9 unit to begin tracking a specific scent article within a designated sector.

scent_article_id.description: The ID of the PLSA secured earlier.

action_set_definitions.name: stabilize_subject
action_set_definitions.description: Deploys medical resources to treat and stabilize a victim's health status.

item_id.description: The medical supply ID to be used.

state_description.mission_time_elapsed: Total minutes passed since the start of the mission.
state_description.weather: Current weather conditions affecting visibility and flight (e.g., 'clear', 'stormy', 'foggy').
state_description.units: List of active rescue units, including their coordinates, battery/fuel levels, and current status.
state_description.victims: List of known victim locations and their health status (e.g., 'stable', 'critical', 'rescued').
state_description.hazard_zones: Geographical areas with active dangers (e.g., 'fire', 'structural_instability') that might damage units.
state_description.resources: Available supplies such as medical kits, food, and water.
